summary: Tested cross-mode-agreement endpoint enhancements and coincidence note UI feature. All backend endpoints return mode_disagreements field correctly. Frontend displays mode disagreement stats and coincidence note appropriately.
passed_tests: GET /api/validation/cross-mode-agreement?dataset_id=iclr-protein returns mode_disagreements with extract_vs_abstract, extract_vs_full_pdf, abstract_vs_full_pdf
GET /api/validation/cross-mode-agreement?dataset_id=peerread_acl_2017 returns mode_disagreements for all 3 modes
GET /api/validation/status?dataset_id=iclr-protein returns with_text count (46) - duplicate $ne fix working
Frontend: ICLR Protein Science shows mode disagreement stats below Head-to-Head table
Frontend: ICLR Protein Science shows coincidence note when extract and abstract have identical rates (68.4% both)
Frontend: ICLR LLMs does NOT show coincidence note since extract (81.3%) and abstract (77.9%) rates differ
Mode disagreements display correct pair counts and percentages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cross-mode-agreement endpoint now includes mode_disagreements field showing pairwise mode differences. ValidationPage.jsx shows this data below the Head-to-Head table and displays a coincidence note when two modes have identical agreement rates.

status_endpoint_fix.line_992_fix: Changed duplicate $ne to $nin - endpoint returns papers_with_full_text: 46 correctly
